summary: A killer front‑of‑house (F.O.B.) recording captures one of the most intense shows ever played on December 5 1981.
review: Both reviewers rave about this concert, calling it a wild, manic blowout that rivals legendary Dead dates like 8/19/80 and 2/27/81. The front‑of‑house tape is praised as “killer” and an absolute must‑have, delivering crystal‑clear, high‑energy sound.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews award five stars and emphasize both exceptional performance intensity and a superb front‑of‑house recording; the combined show (70%) and recording (30%) quality justifies an almost perfect rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Front‑of‑house (F.O.B.) tape described as "killer" with clear, powerful sound; considered a must‑have for any collection.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers describe the concert as wildly intense and compare it favorably to several classic Dead shows, indicating an overall strong flow and energy throughout.
